customManagers.description: config.yaml's `version` is the tag the Supervisor pulls, and it tracks the wrapped labelito release — treat it as a docker dependency on ghcr.io/chiva/labelito.
build.yaml's build_from tags are the per-arch base the HA builder injects; keep them on the same labelito release as config.yaml and the Dockerfile ARG.

packageRules.description: One PR bumps the Dockerfile ARG, build.yaml, and config.yaml's version together, keeping image tag and manifest in lockstep.

config:best-practices enables docker:pinDigests, but the wrapped-labelito base is intentionally tracked by human-readable version tag (kept in lockstep across config.yaml, build.yaml, and the Dockerfile ARG, and verifiable via the signed upstream image). Digest-pinning it would break that invariant, so keep tag-based updates for Docker while retaining Action SHA pinning.
